Log:
  Add new port: deskutils/kdeconnect-kde -- the KF5 baesed version of deskutils/kdeconnect-kde-kde4.

  Thanks to mikael.urankar@gmail.com for the patch fixing segfaults on IPv4 mapped IPV6 addresses.
